prestazioni: Engine: 6.2L supercharged Hellcat Redeye (SRT engine code: ESF) with a custom-built Weistec Engineering Stage 4+ supercharger upgrade (12.5 psi boost, 1,200+ HP), paired with a reinforced ZF 8HP95 8-speed automatic transmission featuring a Punch Powerglide torque converter and a billet-aluminum driveshaft for the 6x6 drivetrain

Forced Induction: Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (hybrid ceramic ball-bearing core) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and a custom intercooler setup by CSF Racing (dual-core, 4,000 CFM airflow) to eliminate heat soak in extreme off-road conditions

Suspension & Drivetrain: Full custom Fox Racing 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers with remote reservoirs (adjustable compression/rebound for each wheel independently), paired with a reinforced Dana 60 front axle and Dana 80 rear axles (both with ARB Air Locker differentials) and a custom 6x6 transfer case by Advance Adapters with a 4.88:1 gear ratio for rock-crawling torque
estetica: Aero: Custom 6x6-specific widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB Works) with carbon fiber fender flares, a front splitter, and a massive rear wing (adjustable angle via hydraulic actuators) for downforce at high speeds on desert terrain

Lighting: Full Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light bar system (50-inch curved bar with 40,000+ lumens) integrated into the front bumper, paired with custom Morimoto XB LED headlights (HID projector swap) and a rear-facing light pod setup for off-road visibility

Exterior: Military-grade Rhino Lining underbody armor with a textured matte finish, combined with a custom matte military green wrap (3M 2080 series) and forged BBS FI-R wheels (22x12 front, 22x14 rear) wrapped in 40-inch Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires for extreme off-road grip
